Booking Enquiry
Cruise Tickets · Sunset Cruise

Broadwater
Sunset Cruise

Duration
2 hours
From
$64.50 pp
Departs
5:00 PM
Book NowView Details
The Experience

Broadwater
Sunset Cruise

Step aboard the Sun Goddess as the Gold Coast sky turns gold. Over two unhurried hours you'll drift through the shimmering Broadwater, watching the city skyline glow and the horizon catch fire — all from the comfort of a 34-metre luxury superyacht.

Keep an eye out for dolphins and turtles playing alongside the hull. A share plate and your first glass arrive as soon as you're settled. There is no better way to end a Gold Coast day.

What’s Included

Everything you need on board.

01
Sparkling on Arrival
One complimentary glass of sparkling wine or premium beer as you board.
02
Nibbles Share Plate
A curated share plate for two served during the cruise.
03
Sunset Views
Watch the sun set over the Gold Coast skyline from the open deck.
04
Wildlife Spotting
Regular dolphin and turtle sightings in the Broadwater waters.
05
Light Commentary
Gentle commentary about the Broadwater, its wildlife, and surrounds.
06
Licensed Bar
Fully stocked bar serving wine, beer, spirits, and soft drinks throughout.
Schedule

Departure timetable.

Boarding
4:30 PM
Departure

Return
7:00 PM
